name: I Left My A-Rank Party to Help My Former Students Reach the Dungeon Depths!
original_name: Aランクパーティを離脱した俺は、元教え子たちと迷宮深部を目指す。
overview: Not every party treats you like a hero—especially when you’re a lowly red mage like Yuke. So, after years of constant ridicule by his A-rank party members, he ditches them. Searching for a new party, he reunites with former students Marina, Silk, and Rain, and joins their group. But on a quest to conquer the world’s greatest dungeon, they become entangled in chaos that threatens the world.
